asset_name: Star Wars Armored Assault Tank (AAT) Low Poly
author: Vehicle Assets Pro
usage_notes: Low-poly AAT (Armored Assault Tank) - iconic Separatist vehicle. Tan/brown metallic walker with distinctive silhouette. Suitable for vehicle unit class in CIS forces. Game-ready topology.
special_notes: Distinctive tank-like walker silhouette with rotating turret
Four-legged stance provides iconic recognizable shape
Tan/brown color scheme matches Trade Federation/Separatist palette
High impact visual for Separatist unit recognition
Suitable for heavy vehicle or cavalry-class unit
No skeleton rig - may require bone setup for walking animation

steps: Click the Download button (requires free Sketchfab account)
Select GLB format (recommended for Unity import)
Save as source_download.glb in this directory
Run: dotnet run --project src/Tools/PackCompiler -- ingest assets raw/sw_aat_walker_sketchfab_001

asset_manifest.json.description: This file - metadata and provenance record

discovery_notes: Discovered via Sketchfab search: 'AAT tank Star Wars low poly'
Score: 9.3/10 - Excellent vehicle silhouette, appropriate polycount, CC-BY license
Iconic vehicle for Separatist force representation
